programme.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
programme.desc: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.

programme.title: FishON! | Furious Walleye Action on Nagagamisis Lake
programme.desc: The FishON! team ventures to the scenic Nagagamisis Lake, northwest of Hearst, Ontario. This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Airtime Ep40: Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surfing Championships - Oregon Coast
programme.desc: Nelscott Reef lies just off the coast of Oregon and is home to a cold, savage wave that only appears 1-2 times per year, but when the conditions are right this awe inspiring wave can reach heights of up to 50-feet. The Nelscott Reef Tow-In Surf Championships involve the world’s best big-wave tow-in surfers including World Champion Garrett MacNamara and XXL champion Brad Gerlach who, along with 20 other world-class surfers, attempt to tame this monster of the sea.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s go time. The mission day has come and the All-Stars have to rendezvous on a nearby island to pick up their supplies. When it comes to gear, Don pulls out all the stops to ensure mission success. From water jets and state-of-the-art fins to maximize speed, to finding a creative way to keep his team lethally armed without breaking any laws.. Don has a few surprises in store for the All-Stars.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The competition reaches its ultimate test as the Face-Off enters Phase Two. Contestants are pushed to their breaking points with a brutal mix of tactical and physical challenges—running and gunning through the forest, navigating five tactical evolutions, and grinding through five grueling physical trials, capped by a punishing two-mile run over unforgiving terrain. Along the way, Don reveals the origins of his legendary SEAL Adventure Challenge, the inspiration behind this ultimate proving ground. When one contestant’s body shuts down in shock, the resilience of the warrior mindset is put on full display in a dramatic fight to recover and press on. In this season finale, only the strongest will endure, but every competitor leaves forged by fire.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: With a successful mission under their belts, the team of All Stars can relax and enjoy a day of diving.. or so they thought. The CIA is calling the team back into action for a VBSS mission to secure deadly poisons that are inbound for civilians. If the team thought the previous mission was challenging, this one makes it look like a cake walk. The All Stars must call upon all their training thus far to make it through this mission, when an unknown element threatens to jeopardize it and them.

programme.title: Boom America

programme.title: Boom America

Then, get your questions about Clear Water quenched as we take a deeper dive into the company and their global legacy. programme.desc: He Dared Death In The Outlaw's Lair! John Travers (John Wayne) takes on a mysterious gang leader known as The Shadow in this vintage western from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Director/writer Robert N. Bradbury (Blue Steel, Riders of Destiny) gets the best o...

programme.title: Fighting Caravans
programme.desc: Clint Belmet (Gary Cooper) is a frontier scout with his hands full in this 1931 Paramount Pictures version of Zane Grey's novel. He's helping guide a wagon train across the country, fighting off various attacks on the way, and falling for his lovely Fe...

programme.title: Rage at Dawn
programme.desc: Randolph Scott plays James Barlow, an agent from Chicago hired to bring the notorious Reno brothers to justice. But wouldnt you know it? The Reno gang includes a beautiful young woman (Mala Powers), who catches Barlows eye. This western from director T...

programme.title: Part II - The Forge
programme.desc: Gideon's mustang drive encounters problems. Agostina must fend off the unwanted advances of cowboys.

programme.title: Part III - The Legacy
programme.desc: Clara's ranch meets an fiery fate, and she decides to join with Gideon.

programme.title: Part IV - The Passing
programme.desc: A range war is erupting in Montana. Call settles issues with Dunnegan and Newt. Cherokee Jack runs amok.

programme.title: Part I - Leaving
programme.desc: Two former Texas Rangers decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: Part II - On The Trail
programme.desc: McCrae and Wood's cattle drive faces deadly situations.

programme.title: The Law and Jake Wade
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Devil's Doorway
programme.desc: A Shoshone Civil War hero (Robert Taylor) fights a crooked Wyoming lawyer (Louis Calhern).

programme.title: Cattle King
programme.desc: President Arthur helps rancher (Robert Taylor) fight fans of open grazing.

programme.title: The Hangman
programme.desc: Grit Xtra invites you to saddle up and ride alongside the larger-than-life stars of TV and cinema’s most iconic Westerns.

programme.title: Spencer's Mountain
programme.desc: Tale of Wyoming couple (Henry Fonda, Maureen O'Hara) with nine kids, small house.

programme.title: Spook Town (1944)
programme.desc: A government agent travels to a remote town rumored to be haunted, where a series of mysterious events are being used to frighten residents away from valuable land. As he investigates, he uncovers a scheme by outlaws exploiting superstition to carry out their plans, and works to expose the truth and restore order.

programme.title: Song of Texas (1943)
programme.desc: A cowboy singer rides into Texas and becomes entangled in a land dispute between honest settlers and a group of outlaws. Using both his quick wits and musical charm, he helps bring justice to the territory while protecting those caught in the conflict.

programme.title: That Girl – S1:E1: Don’t Just Do Something, Stand There
programme.desc: Aspiring actress Ann Marie moves to New York City to pursue her career, determined to make it on her own despite her father’s concerns. As she searches for opportunities, she gets her first taste of the challenges and independence of show business life.

programme.title: Songs and Saddles (1938)
programme.desc: A singing cowboy becomes involved in a range dispute when a group of outlaws tries to force settlers off their land. Using his musical charm and sharpshooting skills, he works to protect the innocent and bring the criminals to justice.

programme.title: Saddle Mountain Roundup (1941)
programme.desc: A cowboy steps in to help a ranching community threatened by a gang trying to take control of local land and cattle. As tensions rise in the Saddle Mountain region, he rallies allies and confronts the outlaws in a fight to restore justice and protect the settlers.

programme.title: Wolves of the Range
programme.desc: Dorn is after the rancher's land and is trying to stop Banker Brady from helping them. When his man Hammond kills Brady, there is a run on the bank and Rocky volunteers to ride to the next town for money.

programme.title: Far Frontier
programme.desc: Willis Newcomb and Bart Carroll head a gang engaged in smuggling wanted-American criminals back into the United States from Mexico. Operating from Sharperville, an oil town on the American side of the border, they transport their human cargo in oil drums loaded on trucks.

programme.title: Blindman 1971
programme.desc: In Blindman, Tony Anthony stars as a blind gunfighter hired to escort fifty mail-order brides across the desert. When a ruthless gang kidnaps the women, he must rely on his instincts, cunning, and deadly aim to bring them back. With Ringo Starr as a treacherous outlaw, this Spaghetti Western delivers gritty action, brutal showdowns, and a unique twist on the lone gunslinger legend.

programme.title: Trouble Busters
programme.desc: Leaving town with the Sheriff after him, Tex joins up with the Trouble Busters Skinny and Windy. In Placerville he runs into trouble with Bill Jarvis leading to a mad rush to file on oil rich land.

programme.title: White Comanche 1968
programme.desc: In White Comanche, William Shatner takes on a daring double role as twin brothers—one a peace-seeking drifter, the other a ruthless Comanche warrior bent on bloodshed. As the frontier town reels from raids and rising violence, the brothers are set on a collision course that can only end in a deadly showdown. Filled with tense standoffs, frontier action, and Shatner’s commanding presence, this Spaghetti Western delivers a tale of fate, family, and vengeance.
